USER_LANDING.INFO: Provide email ID and Mobile no of the company contact person, as registered in Airtel records.
USER_LANDING.KEYFEATURE: Key features of Business Care Portal
USER_LANDING.STEP1_H: Start Using Platform In Simple Steps
USER_LANDING.STEP1_T: Hassle Free Access and Easy Process to Register
USER_LANDING.STEP2_T: All you need to register with Airtel Business Care Platform using Contact Person details
USER_LANDING.STEP3_T: Contact person can login using his/her email ID & password
USER_LANDING.STEP4_T: Manage accounts, lines and raise requests
USER_LANDING.STEP5_T: Simple, fast and Hassle Free Business Services
USER_LANDING.STEP6_T: Customer can check the invoice / bill online and make the payment instantly.
USER_LANDING.STEP7_T: Customer can manage all his accounts, links / lines on line and will be able to view current plans, usage details etc.
USER_LANDING.STEP8_T: View all the invoice, billing & payment details. Download invoices etc
USER_LANDING.STEP9_T: Can buy bundles, enable roaming, CUG service online.
USER_LANDING.STEP10_T: Can buy Airtime for one or more prepaid, hybrid lines, with payment options – Airtel Money, Debit / Credit Cards etc.
USER_LANDING.STEP11_T: Enable SIM SWAP for a lost / damaged SIM or to enable 4G upgrade on SIM.
USER_LANDING.STEP12_T: Raise and track the Service Request online.
USER_LANDING.STEP13_T: View / download account statement, itemized reports etc online.

LANGUAGE_ENUM.access is denied: Reset password link has been expired. Please use new link
LANGUAGE_ENUM.has been raised. expected closure time: has been raised, Expected closure time
LANGUAGE_ENUM.buy airtime for one or more mobile nos (: Buy airtime for one or more mobile nos (prepaid/ Hybrid mobile lines), with payment options of Airtel money and bank debit/ credit card etc
LANGUAGE_ENUM.activate do not disturb service on a giv: Activate do not disturb service on a given mobile no, to stop receiving any product promotional messages from Airtel. You will continue to receive service messages on DND.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.the mobile line will stop receiving airt: The mobile line will stop receiving Airtel promotional/marketing related messages, however Airtel service related message will continue.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.raise an issue with airtel, if you notic: Raise an issue with Airtel, if you notice any discrepency in Airtel Invoices w.r.t billing amount or service charges or wrong customer details.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.raise an issue with airtel, if your paym: Raise an issue with Airtel, if your payment has not been updated in the Airtel records. Share payment details as part of your request.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.request loose sims to be delivered to yo: Request loose SIMs to be delivered to your office address, for future usage of SIM SWAP or activation of new lines.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.raise an issue with airtel, if you are f: Raise an issue with Airtel, if you are facing network issues in your area. If it is a temporary network issue, our network team will look into for resolution.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.instantly activate a new mobile & m2m co: Instantly activate a new mobile & M2M connection, by selecting the service type and line type, provided you have an Airtel SIM which is not linked to any mobile number.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.buy voice, data, sms, combo, internation: Buy Voice, Data, SMS, combo, International calling, Roaming plans/ bundles for a given mobile no (prepaid/ hybrid lines), with payment options from mobile account balance, Airtel money and bank debit/ credit card etc.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.change base plan for a given postpaid/ h: Change base plan for a given postpaid/ Hybrid mobile no, to suit mobile usage pattern, for the best price.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.Change Base Plan for M2M Postpaid Line: Change Base Plan for M2M Postpaid Line
LANGUAGE_ENUM.view transaction wise usage and charge d: View transaction wise usage and charge details for top 10 line on an account, for recent months
LANGUAGE_ENUM.enable sim swap for against a lost/ dama: Enable SIM SWAP for against a lost/ damaged SIM or enable 4G upgrade on SIM, then instant swap with a free SIM to get back the service.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.temporary suspension of service to avoid: Temporary suspension of service to avoid misusage/ monthly charges (postpaid/ Hybrid) on an Airtel line for mobile/ M2M to support cases like mobile lost/ long term international travel.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.change a postpaid mobile line to hybrid: Change a postpaid mobile line to hybrid subscription at the click of a button
LANGUAGE_ENUM.change a postpaid mobile line to prepaid: Change a postpaid mobile line to prepaid subscription at the click of a button
LANGUAGE_ENUM.view transaction wise details for a give: View transaction wise details for a given line, to better understand the charges and usage on the line for a period during the current month.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.change usage limit of a given postpaid/: Change usage limit of a given postpaid/ Hybrid mobile no, to enable a mobile to accommodate cost for mobile base plan, other top up plans (roaming, international calling etc) and PAYG usage.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.add given mobile users (within your corp: Add given mobile users (within your corporate account) to company CUG plan.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.permanent deactivate of an airtel line,: Permanent deactivate of an Airtel line, no more required by client for ongoing usage
LANGUAGE_ENUM.cancel suspension for a temporarily susp: Cancel suspension for a temporarily suspended line, to reactivate the services
LANGUAGE_ENUM.remove given cug users (within your corp: Remove given CUG users (within your corporate account) from the company CUG plan
LANGUAGE_ENUM.raise an issue with airtel - disable aut: Raise an issue with Airtel - disable auto renew
LANGUAGE_ENUM.you can do many actions with the given m: You can do many actions with the given Mobile no. eg. pay bills, swap sim and more.
LANGUAGE_ENUM.raise an issue with airtel - service pro: Raise an issue with Airtel - Service Provisioning Issue
LANGUAGE_ENUM.raise an issue with airtel - buy bulk da: Raise an issue with Airtel - Buy Bulk Data
LANGUAGE_ENUM.raise an issue with airtel - distributed: Raise an issue with Airtel - Distributed Bulk Data
LANGUAGE_ENUM.valid characters are uppercase letters (: Les caractères valides sont les lettres majuscules (A-Z), les lettres minuscules (a-z), les chiffres (0-9), la virgule (,), le tiret (-), #,@,&,% et les espaces
LANGUAGE_ENUM.password minimum length should be 8 char: Password minimum length should be 8 characters, numbers, alphabets and special characters allowed
LANGUAGE_ENUM.change usage limit of postpaid number: Change Usage Limit of Postpaid Number
LANGUAGE_ENUM.buy product for prepaid / hybrid / postp: Buy Product for Prepaid / Hybrid / Postpaid Line
LANGUAGE_ENUM.change base plan for postpaid line: Change Base Plan for Postpaid Line
LANGUAGE_ENUM.Please confirm on cancellation of Tempor: Please confirm on cancellation of Temporary Suspension request
LANGUAGE_ENUM.Do you really want to Temporary Suspend: Do you really want to Temporary Suspend selected lines
LANGUAGE_ENUM.Do you really want to permanent deactiva: Do you really want to permanent deactivate selected lines

LANGUAGE_ENUM.Selected prepaid lines have available pl: Selected prepaid lines have available plan/airtime
